titleStmt.title: SII 10.262: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 262. (A.R. No. 723 of 1930.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE TEMPLE OF RĀMĒŚVARA, NATTA-RĀMĒŚVARAM, TANUKU TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ś. 1140.

summary.p: States that Kolani Sōmaya, son of Kēśavadēva, lord of Kamalākarapura, built the temple of Rāmēśvara at Duttika for the merit of his wife Anyamadēvi. Also refers to gifts of land made by some other persons to the same temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkēśavādhīśasōmāṁbāsuputrau jagaduttamau kommadhātrīśasōmēśakumārau bhrātarau nutau
tayō ramitrahavīrō rājanya ssōmabhūpatiḥ ta syānnamāmahādēvī suṁdarākāraśōbhitā sōmabhūpaṁ pa
rityajya svargastrīnāyakaṁ gatā nijāṁganā sulōkāya svargāya nripanaṁdanaḥ . ḍutti kākhyapurīśāya
rāmēśāya mahātmanē Ācaṁdratārakaṁ vīraṁ kritavā nālayaṁ śubhaṁ . svasti samasta janaparivritā
laṁkrituṁḍunuṁ gamalākarapuravallabhuṁḍunu sukavijanamanōradhārtthapraduṁḍunu sakala
rājāśrayuṁḍunu nanninārāyaṇuṁḍunu manniyadēvēṁdruṁḍunu naina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa lēśva
ra kolanimaṁḍalikakēśavadēvarājula peddakoḍuku kommaya kumāruni tammuṁḍu sōmaya kumā
ruṁḍu dana mahādēvi yaina Anyamadēviki dharmmārtthamugā śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1140 nēṁṭi śrēṣṭhamāsa
muna śū5ni ḻuttika śrīrāmēśvaramahādēvaraku guḍi kaṭṭiṁci nunnamu veṭṭiṁcce
vīri ṭakkopaṁpuna boṭṭu nāgatirājulu dēvanapigatānu . tiḍḍisanimani dalu ga6 Ulligapuvaru na 4 tōṭa .
varu na5 ramēsvarana paṁ[diU]madēviki puṭi janitēpali puṭlureṁḍu . vilasakamapaya sōpulu janitelire2
UtamanaḍamaI cōpuṭu janitēpalire 2 na 4 kusumadiṁtunipottamu cōpuṭiṁ janitēpalini
re2ku sanagayaku Ī cōpuṭi janitepali reṁḍu mokariki Ī puṭijanitēpalipu ḍa mōya
puṭi . mādālakētama reṁḍu [Ī]cōpū janitepali kha2 gaṁtuva 10 śiva brāmaḍapuṭi
Īmapuṁtimaṁcana . dutika janitēpali
nikha 1
Digital edition of SII 10.262 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
